---
title: "nitrix.sparse.ell"
generated: true
signature-hash: aefe55d39ac75951
description: "ELL sparse format primitives."
listing:
  id: nitrix-sparse-ell-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-sparse-ell/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.sparse.ell`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
ELL sparse format primitives.

ELL is the primary sparse format in [`nitrix.sparse`](nitrix-sparse.qmd): the per-row
neighbour list is stored as two arrays, `values: (m, k_max)` and
`indices: (m, k_max)`.  Rows with fewer than `k_max` neighbours
have the trailing entries padded with the semiring identity in
`values` and a fixed (in-range) sentinel index in `indices`.

The format is intentionally a thin pair of dense arrays: no BCOO, no
`jax.experimental.sparse` import.  Sectioned ELL (variable-degree)
will live in `nitrix.sparse.ell_sectioned`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `m` | rows of a multi-row contrast |
| `k_max` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
| `k_actual` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-sparse-ell-symbols}
:::
